instructions: 2. Open WalkMix Creator and create a new 360RA project
3. Import each *_eq.wav file from processed_stems/ as a separate audio object
4. Use the 'objects' array below for spatial placement coordinates
5. Azimuth: left(-) / right(+) in degrees | Elevation: down(-) / up(+) | Distance: 0=close, 1=far
6. Automate Synth and Other for slow movement during transitions
7. QC in binaural headphone preview mode before export
8. Export: .mka 360RA master + binaural WAV + stereo fallback

objects.note: Center-front, intimate and upfront — the listener focus point. Keep close.
Above center — supporting harmonies, celestial layer above the lead.

objects.eq_applied: HP 30Hz | Kick boost 60Hz +2dB | Mud cut 200Hz -2dB | Snare crack 5kHz +2.5dB
objects.note: Front-center, slightly below listener plane — rhythmic anchor, grounded feel.

objects.eq_applied: HP 35Hz | Sub boost 80Hz +3dB | Mud cut 300Hz -2.5dB | LP 250Hz
objects.note: Sub-floor, felt below listener — physical, visceral grounding. Keep centered.
Front-right, ear level — melodic directional landmark. Slight elevation adds presence.
Wide rear sphere, elevated — atmospheric surround wrap. Consider slow automation.
Upper sphere scatter — texture, FX, ambience fill. Place at dome peak for immersive ceiling.
